fg_q04.sql:
SELECT m.category, SUM(t.amount) AS total_transaction_amount
FROM `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.`graph-enriched-schema`.transactions t
JOIN `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.`graph-enriched-schema`.merchants m
  ON t.merchant_id = m.merchant_id
GROUP BY m.category

fg_q05.sql:
SELECT a.account_type, COUNT(t.txn_id) AS transaction_count
FROM `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.`graph-enriched-schema`.transactions t
JOIN `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.`graph-enriched-schema`.accounts a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
GROUP BY a.account_type

fg_q06.sql:
SELECT a.account_type, SUM(al.amount) AS total_transfer_amount
FROM `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.`graph-enriched-schema`.account_links al
JOIN `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.`graph-enriched-schema`.accounts a ON al.src_account_id = a.account_id
GROUP BY a.account_type

fg_q07.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.`graph-enriched-schema`.account_labels WHERE is_fraud = TRUE

fg_q09.sql:
SELECT community_id
FROM `graph-enriched-finance-gold`.`graph-enriched-schema`.gold_fraud_ring_communities
WHERE is_ring_candidate = TRUE

fg_q10.sql:
SELECT a.region, AVG(ga.risk_score) AS avg_risk_score
FROM `graph-enriched-finance-gold`.`graph-enriched-schema`.gold_accounts ga
JOIN `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.`graph-enriched-schema`.accounts a
  ON ga.account_id = a.account_id
GROUP BY a.region

fg_q11.sql:
SELECT account_id_a, account_id_b, similarity_score
FROM `graph-enriched-finance-gold`.`graph-enriched-schema`.gold_account_similarity_pairs
ORDER BY similarity_score DESC

fg_q12.sql:
SELECT
    a.region,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.is_ring_community THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*), 4) AS ring_candidate_share
FROM `graph-enriched-finance-gold`.`graph-enriched-schema`.gold_accounts a
GROUP BY a.region
